title: An Act establishing memorial markers in the towns of Milton and Canton in memory of certain law enforcement officers killed in the line of duty

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Wells of Milton, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 1069) of Richard G. Wells, Jr., that the Department of Conservation and Recreation erect and maintain memorial markers in the towns of Milton and Canton in memory of certain law enforcement officers killed in the line of duty.  Environment and Natural Resources.

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Environment and Natural Resources

related_entities.name: committee on Environment and Natural Resources

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 04/08/2025 from 01:00 PM-05:00 PM in A-1
Bill reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling

related_entities.name: committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling
the committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling
